name: awesome-gbb-azure
description: Microsoft GBB skills for Azure + Microsoft Foundry pilots. Bundles 19 production-tested skills across 5 areas: (1) Foundry building blocks — hosted agents, RAG (Foundry IQ), MCP servers on ACA, evaluation, observability, vision/speech/doc, Teams bot, toolbox, skill catalog, cross-resource, VNet-isolated; (2) ghcp-hosted-agents for using GitHub Copilot models from Foundry; (3) Azure infra — azd-patterns (Bicep + ACA job patterns), azure-tenant-isolation (multi-tenant az/azd safety), azure-sre-agent (GBB wrapper for Azure SRE Agent operator); (4) Governance — citadel-hub-deploy (APIM AI Gateway), citadel-spoke-onboarding, foundry-agt (Agent Governance Toolkit); (5) Cost — paygo-ptu-cost-analyzer (PayGo vs PTU sizing reports). USE FOR: any Foundry pilot, AOAI capacity planning, multi-tenant azd workflow, agent governance, APIM gateway, site-reliability operator agent. DO NOT USE FOR: Threadlight engagements (use awesome-gbb-threadlight — bundles these plus the threadlight-* pipeline).
author: Microsoft GBB
